revision.text: {{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. If you have questions about using Wikipedia, please ask at the '''[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]]''' or the '''[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]]'''. For questions about subjects and topics, please use the '''[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference Desk]]'''. Volunteers at these locations will respond to your questions as soon as possible.}}{{Navbox | name = Wikipedia editor navigation | title = [[Wikipedia:Editor's index to Wikipedia|Wikipedia editor navigation]] - ([[Help:Searching#Administrative namespaces|Search]]) | titlestyle = background-color: #bebeff; | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | listclass = hlist | liststyle = padding: 0px; font-size: 113% | list1 = {{Wikipedia policies and guidelines}} {{Manual of Style}} {{Wikipedia accounts}} {{Wikipedia community}} {{Wikipedia essays|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia help pages}} {{Wikipedia referencing}} {{Wikipedia technical help}} {{Wikipedia templates}} {{Orders, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia}} {{Useful links}} }} {{documentation}}

{{Notice |style=margin-bottom:1.5em; |1=Please do not post your requests or questions on this page. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
